languages.text: "Генетор Фебрус. Весьма дерзкий шаг — заявиться ко мне лично после столь неожиданного исчезновения из вверенной вам лаборатории. Надеюсь, вы осознаете, что вы здесь лишь потому, что я позволил вам жить из-за потенциальной пользы ваших исследований для Империума". {n}Тон инквизитора нейтрально-любезен, но взгляд, которым он награждает Эоганна, исполнен холода.{/n} "Что ж, свита Вольного Торговца — подходящее место для носителей смелых идей. Остается лишь уповать на то, что эти идеи не обратятся в чрезмерное вольнодумство".

"Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."
languages.original_text: "Генетор Фебрус. Весьма дерзкий шаг — заявиться ко мне лично после столь неожиданного исчезновения из вверенной вам лаборатории. Надеюсь, вы осознаете, что вы здесь лишь потому, что я позволил вам жить из-за потенциальной пользы ваших исследований для Империума". {n}Тон инквизитора нейтрально-любезен, но взгляд, которым он награждает Эоганна, исполнен холода.{/n} "Что ж, свита Вольного Торговца — подходящее место для носителей смелых идей. Остается лишь уповать на то, что эти идеи не обратятся в чрезмерное вольнодумство".

We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

languages.text: «Genetor Februs. Es una decisión atrevida personarse ante mí tras desaparecer del laboratorio que se había confiado. Espero que comprenda que si está aquí es porque he permitido que sobreviva, dada la posible utilidad de su investigación para el Imperium». {n}El tono del Inquisidor es neutro, pero la mirada que dirige a Eogunn te hiela la sangre.{/n} «Que así sea. El séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente es un santuario para mentes atrevidas. Solo espero que esas ideas no den lugar a un librepensamiento excesivo».
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

traits.locale_text: «Genetor Februs. Es una decisión atrevida personarse ante mí tras desaparecer del laboratorio que se había confiado. Espero que comprenda que si está aquí es porque he permitido que sobreviva, dada la posible utilidad de su investigación para el Imperium». {n}El tono del Inquisidor es neutro, pero la mirada que dirige a Eogunn te hiela la sangre.{/n} «Que así sea. El séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente es un santuario para mentes atrevidas. Solo espero que esas ideas no den lugar a un librepensamiento excesivo».

languages.text: “基因士费布鲁斯。在从委托给你的实验室中离奇失踪之后，你居然还敢亲自出现在我面前，真是好大的胆子。希望你能明白，你之所以还能站在这里，仅仅是因为你的研究对于帝国或许仍有价值，我才允许你继续活下去。”{n}审判官的语气礼貌得无可挑剔，但他投向伊奥贡的目光却令人不寒而栗。{/n}“很好，看来行商浪人的随行队伍，确实是心怀大胆构想之人的避风港。我们只希望这些构想不会演变成过度的自由思想。”
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

traits.locale_text: “基因士费布鲁斯。在从委托给你的实验室中离奇失踪之后，你居然还敢亲自出现在我面前，真是好大的胆子。希望你能明白，你之所以还能站在这里，仅仅是因为你的研究对于帝国或许仍有价值，我才允许你继续活下去。”{n}审判官的语气礼貌得无可挑剔，但他投向伊奥贡的目光却令人不寒而栗。{/n}“很好，看来行商浪人的随行队伍，确实是心怀大胆构想之人的避风港。我们只希望这些构想不会演变成过度的自由思想。”

languages.text: "Genetor Februs. Ein überaus verwegener Schritt ... Euch mir persönlich zu stellen, nachdem Ihr so unerwartet aus dem Euch anvertrauten Labor verschwunden seid. Ich hoffe, Euch ist klar, dass Ihr nur hier seid, weil ich Euch angesichts des möglichen Nutzens Eurer Forschung für das Imperium am Leben ließ." {n}Der Tonfall des Inquisitors ist neutral und höflich, aber der Blick, mit dem er Eogunn bedenkt, ist beängstigend.{/n} "Schön, schön, das Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ist in der Tat ein Hafen für mutige Ideen. Wir hoffen nur, dass diese Ideen nicht in übermäßiges Freidenkertum münden."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

traits.locale_text: "Genetor Februs. Ein überaus verwegener Schritt ... Euch mir persönlich zu stellen, nachdem Ihr so unerwartet aus dem Euch anvertrauten Labor verschwunden seid. Ich hoffe, Euch ist klar, dass Ihr nur hier seid, weil ich Euch angesichts des möglichen Nutzens Eurer Forschung für das Imperium am Leben ließ." {n}Der Tonfall des Inquisitors ist neutral und höflich, aber der Blick, mit dem er Eogunn bedenkt, ist beängstigend.{/n} "Schön, schön, das Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ist in der Tat ein Hafen für mutige Ideen. Wir hoffen nur, dass diese Ideen nicht in übermäßiges Freidenkertum münden."

languages.text: « Genetor Februs. Vous ne manquez pas d'audace pour vous présenter devant moi après avoir déserté le laboratoire confié à vos soins du jour au lendemain. Si vous êtes ici, c'est uniquement parce que je vous ai laissé la vie sauve en raison de l'utilité potentielle de vos recherches pour l'Imperium. J'espère que vous en êtes conscient. » {n}Si le ton de l'inquisiteur conserve une neutralité polie, le regard qu'il porte sur Eogunn est proprement glaçant.{/n} « Soit, l'entourage {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} est un refuge pour quiconque nourrit des idées audacieuses. Reste à espérer que lesdites idées ne tournent pas à un excès condamnable de libre pensée. »
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

Reste à espérer que lesdites idées ne tournent pas à un excès condamnable de libre pensée. »

languages.text: "Genetör Februs. Size emanet edilen laboratuvardan öylesine beklenmedik bir şekilde kaybolduktan sonra bizzat karşıma çıkmanız son derece cüretkâr bir adım. Umarım sadece araştırmanızın İmparatorluk'a potansiyel yararı nedeniyle yaşamanıza izin verdiğim için burada olduğunuzun farkındasınızdır." {n}Engizisyoncu'nun tonu tarafsız bir şekilde kibar, Eogunn'a fırlattığı bakış ise dondurucu.{/n} "Hür Tacir'in maiyeti gerçekten de cesur fikirler barındıranlar için bir sığınak. Bu fikirlerin aşırı özgür düşünceye dönüşmemesini umuyoruz."
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."

traits.locale_text: "Genetör Februs. Size emanet edilen laboratuvardan öylesine beklenmedik bir şekilde kaybolduktan sonra bizzat karşıma çıkmanız son derece cüretkâr bir adım. Umarım sadece araştırmanızın İmparatorluk'a potansiyel yararı nedeniyle yaşamanıza izin verdiğim için burada olduğunuzun farkındasınızdır." {n}Engizisyoncu'nun tonu tarafsız bir şekilde kibar, Eogunn'a fırlattığı bakış ise dondurucu.{/n} "Hür Tacir'in maiyeti gerçekten de cesur fikirler barındıranlar için bir sığınak. Bu fikirlerin aşırı özgür düşünceye dönüşmemesini umuyoruz."

languages.text: 「ジェネター・フェブルス。予想外の研究所からの失踪後、自ら姿を現すとは、実に大胆な行動ですね。貴方の研究が帝国に役立つ可能性があるからこそ、命を許したに過ぎません。この場にいるのは、私の許可によるものです。」{n}インクィジターの口調は礼儀正しく、しかし、エオガンを見据えた目は冷酷です。{/n}「それでは、ローグ・トレーダーの側近は、大胆な考えを持つ者たちの避難所ですね。ただ、その考えが過剰な自由思想に転じてしまうことを願いません。」
languages.original_text: "Genetor Februs. A most audacious step — to present yourself to me in person after such an unexpected disappearance from the laboratory entrusted to you. I hope you realise that you are only here because I have permitted you to live, owing to the potential utility of your research for the Imperium." {n}The Inquisitor's tone is neutrally polite, but the look he bestows upon Eogunn is chilling.{/n} "Very well, the Rogue Trader's retinue is indeed a haven for those who harbour bold ideas. We only hope that these ideas do not turn into excessive free-thinking."
